## Schema

### Required

- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `spec` (Attributes) TagSetDeploymentSpec defines the desired state of TagSetDeployment (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))

### Optional

- `alarms` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alarms))

- `name` (String) name of the TagSetDeployment
- `namespace` (String) the namespace scope in which to operate
- `status` (Attributes) TagSetDeploymentStatus defines the observed state of TagSetDeployment (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))
